subject: Golett, an ancient clay golem Pokemon with glowing eyes, depicted against a cosmic purple background
description: A compact, cylindrical clay golem stands upright against a vivid purple cosmic backdrop featuring a swirling vortex or galaxy pattern. The creature's body is blue-gray with squared segmented limbs and visible glyph-like markings pressed into the clay surface. Its eyes glow a warm yellow-orange. The cosmic background gives the ancient artifact a sense of mysterious, otherworldly power. The pose is stable and forward-facing, arms slightly raised in a ready stance.
foreground: Golett, a rounded clay golem with glowing orange eyes and glyph markings on its surface
background: Swirling cosmic vortex in deep purple with galaxy-like patterns
